Tell me about the hardest thing you were ever asked to do.
Sarah laughed when she heard. Were you afraid to believe the promise?
What happened when the three visitors came to your tent?
Why did you leave your father's house in Haran?
Tell me about your son Ishmael and what became of him.
What was the covenant God made with you?

What did you feel when you had to send Hagar away?
Walking back down the mountain after the binding, what exactly did Isaac say to you, word for word?
What did you think of the pharaohs and the pyramids you saw in Egypt?

Who do you want to be remembered as?
